title: Tests for from_uri_writable dispatch
description: Add tests in secretx/src/lib.rs for from_uri_writable. Oracle: the correct dispatch behavior is derived from the backend matrix (9 writable, 4 read-only stubs, signing-only). Tests must not make network calls. Test each case: (a) writable backends return Ok for each enabled feature, (b) env returns Err(InvalidUri), (c) bitwarden returns Err(InvalidUri) when feature enabled, (d) unknown backend returns Err(InvalidUri), (e) aws-sm with ?field= returns Err(InvalidUri), (f) from_uri still works on same URIs (regression).
